metadata.title: DJviral — Your set becomes 30 viral clips. No editing required.
metadata.description: Upload a set up to 3 hours long. DJviral finds the best moments and delivers 30 vertical videos ready for TikTok and Reels.

hero.subtitle: Upload your set. Our AI finds the drops, the switch-ups and the highest-energy moments and hands back vertical videos ready for your feed.

how.title: From file to feed in three steps.

step1.title: Upload your set
step1.body: Drag in your set video, up to 3 hours long

step2.title: AI cuts the peaks
step2.body: We detect drops, switch-ups and the highest-energy moments and cut automatically  no need to review everything yourself.

step3.title: Get 30 clips
step3.body: 9:16 vertical videos, ready to post on TikTok, Reels and Shorts. You can still edit any clip however you like

pricing.title: Start free. Grow when it pops off.

pro.name: Pro
pro.feature1: Up to 5 hours of sets per month
pro.feature4: Re-cut down to the exact minute

premium.name: Premium
premium.feature1: Up to 12 hours of sets per month
premium.feature4: Re-cut down to the exact minute

finalCta.title: Your next set already has 30 clips waiting.
finalCta.subtitle: Upload a set now and watch DJviral turn 1 hour into 10 clips — for free.

generator.dropHint: MP4 · up to 3 hours · the file never leaves your browser
generator.dropCta: Select a file and try for free

dynamic.title: Dynamic cut
dynamic.desc: Zooms on the DJ and the crowd, on the beat.

generator.cutsHint: On the free trial, up to {max} clips per set.

gate.title: Create your account to generate the clips
gate.text: It's free — our AI will cut {name} into {count, plural, one {# vertical 9:16 video} other {# vertical 9:16 videos}} ready for your feed.

beforeAfter.title: From one giant set to a whole feed.
beforeAfter.footer: One click turns the whole set into clips ready for TikTok, Reels and Shorts.

premium.name: Premium

errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load your plan. Reload the page.

justPaid.text: ✓ Payment complete! Your plan activates as soon as AbacatePay's confirmation arrives (usually a few seconds).

plan.remaining: {remaining} of set left · up to {maxCuts} clips per set
plan.pastDue: ⚠ The last charge failed — AbacatePay will retry. Check your card to avoid losing access.
plan.adminAccount: Admin account — unlimited usage, no billing. The cards below are just the publicly sold plans.
plan.paymentFootnote: Payments are processed by AbacatePay (Brazil). International billing is not available yet — contact us to subscribe.

saved.empty: No clips saved yet. Generate a set and save your favorite clips.

share.title: Public link
share.enabledHint: Anyone with the link can view and download the saved clips.
share.disabledHint: Generate a link so anyone can view and download the saved clips.
share.messageLabel: Message shown at the top of the link (optional)
share.messagePlaceholder: e.g.: Thanks for checking out the set! Grab the clips and tag @yourprofile 🔥

folder.cutsCount: {count, plural, one {# saved clip} other {# saved clips}}

errors.processingFailed: Processing failed. Check the worker logs.

generator.selectHint: select the ones you want to save — unsaved clips disappear on reload
generator.savedInTab: ✓ {count, plural, one {# clip} other {# clips}} saved · available in the Saved clips tab

form.title: New set
form.subtitle: Upload your set and automatically get the most viral clips.

dynamic.title: Dynamic cut
dynamic.desc: Zooms on the DJ and the crowd, cut to the beat. Takes longer.

intense.title: Intense
intense.desc: Lots of dj/crowd switching, strong beat zooms.

form.planAllows: Your plan allows up to {max} clips per set.
form.uploadHint: This can take a bit depending on the video size and your connection.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.canceledOk: ✓ Subscription canceled. You're back on the free plan.
subscription.confirmText: Are you sure? You'll go back to the free plan and lose access to the paid plan's limits.
subscription.cancelHint: Cancels the renewal and goes back to the free plan.

security.title: Security
security.passwordTooShort: The new password must be at least 6 characters.
security.passwordMismatch: The confirmation doesn't match the new password.

errors.codecUnsupported: the browser can't play this file's format/codec (e.g. iPhone HEVC/MOV or MKV)
errors.networkFailure: network failure while downloading the original video from storage
errors.sourceLoadFailed: the original video couldn't be loaded
errors.recutSlow: The re-cut is taking a while. Try again shortly.

sourceUnavailable.withError: Couldn't play this set's original video: {reason}. The preview below shows the already-generated clip; you can still adjust start/end and the title — manual zoom needs the original video.
sourceUnavailable.noSource: This set's original video isn't available for preview (YouTube set or removed file). You can adjust start/end on the timeline — manual zoom needs the original video.

editor.regeneratingVideo: Regenerating the video with the new edit...

panel.framingHint: Drag the video in the preview (or scroll) to frame it. Each adjustment becomes a ◆ keyframe at the current point.
panel.noKeyframes: No keyframes yet — the camera stays centered.

timeline.hint: drag the purple handles to shorten or extend the clip — you can go beyond what the AI picked (the white line below marks the original choice). To keep the editor light, the timeline loads ~1 min before and after the clip; extending the clip moves the window along.

editPicker.empty: No clips to edit yet. Generate a set in the Generator or save clips — they'll show up here to adjust timing, zoom and keyframes.
editPicker.title: Choose a clip to edit
editPicker.subtitle: adjust start/end on the timeline, drag the TikTok window and create zoom keyframes

publicShare.noCuts: This set doesn't have any published clips yet.

login.subtitleLogin: Access your account to generate clips.
login.subtitleRegister: It's free — no credit card required.

hero.eyebrow: MADE FOR DJS WHO WANT TO BLOW UP
hero.subtitle: Upload a set up to 3 hours long. DJviral finds the best moments and delivers 30 vertical videos ready for TikTok and Reels.
hero.microcopy: No credit card · First clips in minutes

how.title: From file to feed in 3 steps.

step1.title: Upload your set
step1.body: Drag in a file up to 3 hours long, or paste a SoundCloud, YouTube or Mixcloud link.

step2.title: AI finds the peaks
step2.body: We detect drops, switch-ups and the highest-energy moments of the set — no need to listen through it all again.

step3.title: Get 30 clips
step3.body: 9:16 vertical videos, already captioned and ready to post on TikTok and Reels.

pricing.title: Start free. Grow when it pops off.

finalCta.title: Your best drops don't deserve to die on SoundCloud.
finalCta.subtitle: Upload a set now and watch DJviral turn 1 hour into 10 clips — for free.
